title: Markiplier Overlay
description: Adds an overlay on your screen so it looks like markiplier's doing a lets play of your game
body:
Adds a little overlay on your game so it looks like Markiplier's doing a let's play on it, may calm your nerves

first mod ever! if u (somehow) encounter issues pray to god for I do not have the answers
![marketfire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87ef5c1207063cbb56da2bedc11ffc8f9f673216.webp)

Bonus points if you can guess what video the images are from!!
